_note: The productized Quad-OS platform — subscription packages + multi-tenant onboarding. Presentation layer only; NO billing/credentials here. Drives platform.html. Public-safe: describes the OFFERINGS, never the private tools/data behind them (the grants library, prosecutorial back end, etc. stay owner-only).
tagline: One civic + creative operating system. Many tenants. Built on Maui, under the aloha of Christ.
foundation: Four pillars — Food · Education · Truth · Charter — served as one system.

quadrants.name: govOS
quadrants.what: Public-record civic transparency for any government — officials, money, votes, contracts, agendas, charter-to-law.

quadrants.name: Music Video
quadrants.what: AI music-video production with the artist's true likeness — one photo + a song becomes a finished video.

quadrants.name: Film
quadrants.what: Feature films built shot-by-shot from a written script, the cast face-locked across every scene.

quadrants.name: Game · Sage
quadrants.what: The 54-node Sage Game — a playable journey across the Hawaiian lineages and the sovereignty scrolls.

multi_tenant.headline: Every government, every artist, every mission is a tenant.
multi_tenant.body: Each tenant is tracked separately — its own data, its own reports, its own surfaces — so the work never bleeds between them. Onboarding a new county, a new state, or a new creator is the same repeatable step: register the tenant, point it at its sources, and its pages fill themselves.
examples: A county wanting its own transparency portal
An artist's full music-video + film pipeline
A mission needing the grant engine

subscriptions.name: Grant Writing
subscriptions.tagline: We write the grants that fund the work.
subscriptions.body: A library of authored grants + AI drafting turns your mission into ready applications — food security, housing, culture, education. Eligibility-gated, source-grounded, never boilerplate.

tiers.name: Sustained
tiers.for: an ongoing pipeline of applications + deadlines watched

subscriptions.name: Games · Sage
subscriptions.tagline: Every game free to play. Live multiplayer when you want it.
subscriptions.body: All TribeGameStudios games — SAGE (the 54-node journey, Mauka to Makai, the lineages and the scrolls), Konane, Weiqi and the growing catalog — are free to play, solo, always. The Multiplayer Circles Pass unlocks live circles: real-time turns with friends across the catalog. (Reconciled 2026-07-16 to the live WooCommerce store; prices are read from it, never hardcoded.)

tiers.name: Multiplayer Circles Pass
tiers.for: live real-time circles with friends — post-beta pricing announced before anything changes

subscriptions.name: The Dispatch
subscriptions.tagline: The work, sent to you — civic findings, the films, the harvest.
subscriptions.body: A newsletter from inside the system: what the audits surfaced (asked in aloha-truth), the films as they render, the Sage cards as they land. Not yet invented — shaped with the first subscribers.
